name: Fastenal
analysis: FAST's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $47.1000, stop $44.1936, target $55.8192 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
